description: Modify the properties of a face. In the current building block set the face with ID i will be modified.
notes: Requires a current building-blocks set: run 'building-blocks set create <name>' then 'building-blocks set select <name>' before any block/edge/face/point operation; otherwise FLAC rejects the command with 'Unused extra parameter'.

keywords.name: control-point
keywords.description: Modify control points of the face. Must be followed by an 'add', 'delete', 'move', 'rotate', 'select', or 'translate' sub-keyword.

keywords.name: control-point-add
keywords.description: Add a face control points (CPs) grid of size i1 X i2 that represents a bicubic spline interpolation of the face curvature. If the face already had CPs, the grid will be replaced. The non-negative parameters i1 and i2 can be (0,2,3,…,20). If both of them are 0 (zero), CPs will be removed.

keywords.name: control-point-delete
keywords.description: Delete the control points grid from the face.

keywords.name: control-point-move
keywords.description: Move the control point defined by a pair of indices ( i1 , i2 ) on the CP grid to a new position defined by vector v . The vector comes first, then the 'index' keyword and the two grid indices.

keywords.name: control-point-rotate
keywords.description: Rotate control points of the face defined by indices using an angle of rotation f (in degrees) around the axis of rotation defined by the origin point v_1 and direction vector v_2 . The keyword order is strict: origin, direction, angle, indices.

keywords.name: control-point-select
keywords.description: Select the control point(s) on the face (no further arguments).

keywords.name: control-point-translate
keywords.description: Translate control points identified by indices by adding v to each position.

keywords.name: type
keywords.description: Specify the curve-type of the face. Must be followed by a 'non-curved' or 'bi-cubic-spline' sub-keyword.
